subcodes.first_line: O ye offshoots of the Blessed Tree! Your letters were received and perused. Ever [...] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الافنون من السدره المبارکه مکاتیب شما رسید و ملاحظه گردید همیشه کمال
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
